courseTitle: Game Systems, Loops, and Player Experience
title: Resource Conversion Puzzle
genericDescription: Design resources as verbs; create puzzle constraints from conversion rules; teach through level sequence.
specificDescription: Build a puzzle game with at least three resource types and two conversion actions. Include five authored levels that introduce, combine, and test the rules without a tutorial paragraph.
gradingRubric: 30 pts resource economy clarity; 25 pts puzzle progression; 15 pts interface readability; 15 pts bug-free completion path; 15 pts reflection and test notes.
